hyperedges.label: Phase 3+4 audit findings mapped to onboarding fixes
SettingsScreen navigation router pattern
hyperedges.description: SettingsScreen acts as a client-side router: CategoryRow taps set view state, and each view renders a SubScreen wrapper — all three together implement the drill-down navigation pattern

hyperedges.label: Security sub-system: 2FA + password + sessions
hyperedges.description: All five components together implement the full security management flow: password change with confirmation, 2FA enable/disable lifecycle, and per-device session revocation

hyperedges.label: Global window store access pattern
hyperedges.description: useSettingsData reads all four global window stores (__mtxProfile, __mtxIsPremium, __mtxOnboarding, __mtxAuth) and re-renders on mtx:profile-changed event — these five nodes form the settings data layer

hyperedges.label: Premium gating pattern
hyperedges.description: All components that check window.__mtxIsPremium and call window.__mtxOpenPremiumLock to gate premium content

hyperedges.label: Ritual scheduling integration pattern
hyperedges.description: Hooks, helpers, and components that collaborate to add/check items in the daily ritual schedule

hyperedges.label: Player configuration cluster
hyperedges.description: Components and stores that control in-player configuration: skip seconds, playback speed, bookmarks, sleep timer

hyperedges.label: Social profile open flow
hyperedges.relationship: Three-node pipeline: _openSocialUrl builds URL, __mtxOpenInAppBrowser triggers sheet, InAppBrowserSheet handles blocked-domain preview vs iframe

hyperedges.label: Achievement render chain
hyperedges.relationship: Data → derivation → presentation: _ALL_ACHIEVEMENTS feeds _buildAchievementsForUser to add unlock state, AchievementCardFull renders the result

hyperedges.label: Own/foreign profile parity architecture
hyperedges.relationship: ProfileStatsTab is reused for both own and foreign profiles; _deriveStatsFor switches between hardcoded own data and seed-derived foreign data; _USER_STATS_DONUT overrides donut segments per user

hyperedges.label: Settings v7 Design System
hyperedges.description: All visual subsystems that together define the Settings v7 design language: accent colors, typography, themes, and interaction patterns

hyperedges.label: Settings as Navigation Hub
hyperedges.description: Full navigation tree rooted at the Configuración screen, spanning all drill-down sub-screens

audit_findings: Cancel reason grid had inconsistent card heights (fixed in audit-10)
Character counter in optional textarea only showed on focus (fixed in audit-11 to always visible)
Retention offer correctly triggered only for price-related cancellation reason
Post-cancel settings correctly shows free plan state
Password strength indicator works correctly (Muy fuerte state verified)
Confirm password match checkmark works
Save button correctly disabled/enabled based on form validity
Session revocation removes the session from the list
2FA row expands to show coming soon info card
Form resets to empty state after successful password save

nodes.label: ProfileScreen
nodes.description: Main user profile screen — own profile, achievements, stats, reviews tabs

nodes.label: EditProfileSheet
nodes.description: Bottom sheet for editing identity fields (name, handle, tagline, bio, link) and social handles

nodes.label: useProfile
nodes.description: Reactive hook reading __mtxProfile store, re-renders on mtx:profile-changed event

nodes.label: __mtxProfile store
nodes.description: Global window store for editable profile data; exposes get/update; emits mtx:profile-changed

nodes.label: AchievementBadge
nodes.description: Animated rotating conic-gradient badge with icon and glow pulses

nodes.label: AchievementBadgeV2
nodes.description: Badge that renders locked (IcLock) or unlocked (AchievementBadge) state

nodes.label: AchievementCard
nodes.description: Scroll-snap card showing achievement progress bar, current/total stats

nodes.label: AchievementCardFull
nodes.description: Full-width clickable achievement card with tier pill, progress, unlock status

nodes.label: ProfileReviewCard
nodes.description: Social-style review card with like, comment, share actions and item embed; syncs with useCommentCount

nodes.label: useUserReviews
nodes.description: Reactive hook for __mtxReviews store, re-renders on mtx:reviews-changed

nodes.label: StatsDonut
nodes.description: SVG donut chart for minutes-per-category distribution

nodes.label: ProfileStatsTab
nodes.description: 10-card pro analytics dashboard — reusable for own and other-user profile (isOwn flag), includes area charts, heatmap, hour-peak bars, donut, percentile

nodes.label: _deriveStatsFor
nodes.description: Pure helper that derives all mock stats for own or foreign profile — seed-deterministic for consistency

nodes.label: _buildAchievementsForUser
nodes.description: Derives achievement current values for a foreign user from profile.hours, level, followers using seed

nodes.label: HeroNextAchievement
nodes.description: Hero card for the closest-to-unlock achievement in the awards tab, supports accentOverride for category filter

nodes.label: _ALL_ACHIEVEMENTS
nodes.description: 30 achievements across 6 categories × 5 rarity tiers; each with narrative, percentile, targets

nodes.label: _ACHIEVEMENT_TIERS
nodes.description: 5 rarity tiers: common, rare, epic, legendary, mythic — each with color and glow

nodes.label: _ACHIEVEMENT_CATEGORIES
nodes.description: 6 achievement axes: focus, learning, consistency, depth, variety, community

nodes.label: _getSocialBrand
nodes.description: Returns brand-authentic bg/glow/border for each social network icon button

nodes.label: _openSocialUrl
nodes.description: Builds universal link URL for social handle; uses https:// standard 2026 — no custom URL schemes
nodes.rationale: Universal links open native app on mobile when installed; avoids double-call + fallback timer

nodes.label: _buildAreaPaths
nodes.description: SVG cubic-bezier smooth area path builder for analytics charts

nodes.label: UserProfileScreen
nodes.description: Full-screen overlay for viewing another user's profile — follow/unfollow CTA, reviews, stats, awards tabs

nodes.label: useFollow
nodes.description: Reactive hook on __mtxFollows store for a specific userId; re-renders on mtx:follows-changed

nodes.label: resolveUserProfile
nodes.description: Merges _USER_PROFILES_DETAIL[userId] with _USER_STATS_MOCK stats (followers, hours, level)

nodes.label: _USER_PROFILES_DETAIL
nodes.description: Hardcoded enriched profiles for 6 users: mariana, andres, lucia, tomas, isabella, rodrigo — bio, avatar, socials, xp

nodes.label: _USER_STATS_DONUT
nodes.description: Per-user donut segment data consumed by ProfileStatsTab when isOwn=false

nodes.label: __mtxAutoRoutines store
nodes.description: Global in-memory store for auto routines — add/list/remove/update; emits mtx:auto-routines-changed

nodes.label: useAutoRoutines
nodes.description: Reactive hook for auto-routines store

nodes.label: AutoRoutineCreateSheet
nodes.description: Bottom sheet for creating/editing an auto-routine; shows schedule, days, blocked-apps, routines setup tiles; supports editMode

nodes.label: SetupTile
nodes.description: Tile in AutoRoutineCreateSheet showing a setup section (time/apps/routines) with tap-to-edit

nodes.label: TimeField
nodes.description: HH:MM input field used in AutoRoutineCreateSheet schedule section

nodes.label: InAppBrowserSheet
nodes.description: Instagram-style bottom sheet browser; detects blocked domains and shows preview card; uses ReactDOM.createPortal into mtx-overlay-root; swipe-down-to-close

nodes.label: _IAB_BLOCKED domains
nodes.description: Set of social-network domains that block iframe embedding — shows preview card instead of iframe

nodes.label: __mtxOpenInAppBrowser global
nodes.description: Global window function lifted to MentexApp shell; opens InAppBrowserSheet with url, socialId, label, handle

nodes.label: Icon base component
nodes.description: Base SVG wrapper — size, stroke, fill, strokeWidth props; all icons compose this

nodes.label: Brand social icons
nodes.description: Authentic brand SVG icons: IcTikTok, IcYoutube, IcLinkedIn, IcGithub, IcInstagramBrand, IcSpotifyBrand, IcXBrand — filled, not stroked

nodes.label: Skip controls icons
nodes.description: IcSkipPrev, IcSkipNext, IcSkipBack, IcSkipForward — arc-style with embedded seconds text

nodes.label: MentexApp
nodes.description: Root React component — manages global state: tab, modal contexts, inAppBrowser, settingsOpen, userProfileId, player

nodes.label: Script loading order
nodes.description: All screens loaded as text/babel scripts in dependency order; icons and shared loaded first; in-app-browser loaded last

nodes.label: Settings Audit Lessons
nodes.description: 6 findings (CRIT-2 + IMP-5) from settings-flow.jsx audit; commits to 39f4107

nodes.label: CRIT-1: stale closure in EliminarCuentaSubScreen
nodes.description: onDeleted prop not in useEffect deps — stale closure bug. Fix: add to [step, onDeleted]
nodes.rationale: Builder-mode focus on step-machine flow missed that onDeleted is a prop not a stable value

nodes.label: CRIT-2: isPlanCancelled not reset on close
nodes.description: Permanently-mounted component (open prop) kept local state between sessions. Fix: reset in useEffect([open])
nodes.rationale: Builder-mode assumed component destructs on close; the always-mounted+open-prop pattern requires explicit state reset
nodes.norm_label: crit-2: isplancancelled not reset on close

nodes.label: IMP-7: Bridge __mtxPlayContent Settings→Explorar
nodes.description: Cross-file bridge implemented: __mtxCloseSettings in MentexApp, __mtxPlayContent in explore-flow.jsx, fallback to __explore_home__

nodes.label: Always-mounted + open prop pattern
nodes.description: Dominant pattern in Mentex: screens never unmount, receive open:bool prop. Requires explicit useEffect([open]) to reset all local state on close

nodes.label: Universal links for socials (2026 standard)
nodes.description: Use https:// universal links instead of custom URL schemes (instagram://) — OS opens native app when installed, browser otherwise; no double-call or fallback timers

nodes.label: Window global store pattern
nodes.description: Stores live on window (__mtxProfile, __mtxFollows, __mtxReviews, __mtxAutoRoutines); emit CustomEvents; React hooks subscribe via addEventListener

nodes.label: ReactDOM.createPortal overlay pattern
nodes.description: Sheets that must render above the tab bar use ReactDOM.createPortal into #mtx-overlay-root — escapes stacking context of parent component

nodes.label: Seed-deterministic mock data
nodes.description: Foreign user stats derived deterministically from userId.charCodeAt(0) seed — consistent across renders without backend

nodes.label: mtx:open-user-profile event
nodes.description: Custom event dispatched from community/thread taps; MentexApp listener sets userProfileId to open UserProfileScreen overlay

nodes.label: mtx:open-item-from-community event
nodes.description: Dispatched from profile/community item taps; MentexApp switches to explore tab then dispatches mtx:explore-open-item

nodes.label: mtx:profile-changed event
nodes.description: Emitted by __mtxProfile.update(); triggers useProfile hook re-render

nodes.label: mtx:follows-changed event
nodes.description: Emitted by __mtxFollows store; triggers useFollow hook re-render

nodes.label: mtx:auto-routines-changed event
nodes.description: Emitted by __mtxAutoRoutines mutations; triggers useAutoRoutines hook re-render

properties.title: Configuraciones
properties.description: Main settings screen showing user profile card with avatar, username (@juandiego), level badge (7), title (Mente Despierta), Premium badge, XP progress bar (234/500 XP), Edit Profile button. Sections: MI PLAN (Mentex Premium - ACTIVO, annual renewal in 7 days, Gestionar suscripción button), TU CUENTA (Cuenta row, Seguridad row), EN LA APP (Mi aprendizaje row). Dev overlay: Mentex Tweaks panel visible with auth shortcuts, state, accent, card style, typography controls.

properties.title: Configuraciones
properties.description: Settings screen without dev overlay, showing full layout cleanly: profile card (Juan Diego, @juandiego, Mente Despierta, Premium badge, 234/500 XP bar, Editar perfil button). MI PLAN section with Mentex Premium ACTIVO card (Anual, Mejor valor, Renueva en 7 días) and Gestionar suscripción button. TU CUENTA: Cuenta row (Perfil, nombre, email y más), Seguridad row (Contraseña y acceso). EN LA APP: Mi aprendizaje row (Todo el contenido que has completado).

properties.title: Mi Plan
properties.description: Subscription management screen. ESTADO section: Mentex Premium ACTIVO card with annual billing at $7.99/mes, renewal in 7 days, billed $95.88/year. CICLO DE FACTURACIÓN: two options — Mensual ($9.99/mes, facturado cada mes) vs Anual ($7.99/mes, 2 meses gratis, MEJOR VALOR badge, selected with checkmark). HISTORIAL DE PAGOS: shows two payments of $95.88 (1 may 2026 PAGADO, 1 may 2025 PAGADO), Ver 3 pagos anteriores expandable. ZONA DE RIESGO: Cancelar suscripción row in red (Tu acceso continúa hasta el 31 may 2026).

properties.title: Cancelar plan
properties.description: First step of cancellation flow. Shows what user would lose: crown icon in pink circle, headline 'Esto es lo que perderías', access end date (31 de mayo, 2026). List of losses with red X badges: Acceso a +2,400 contenidos premium; Descargas offline para escuchar sin internet; Coach IA ilimitado sin restricciones; Rutinas avanzadas y bloqueos inteligentes; Sin anuncios sin interrupciones. Two CTAs: primary teal 'Seguir con Premium' button, secondary text 'Continuar con la cancelación →'.

properties.title: ¿Por qué cancelas?
properties.description: Second step of cancellation — churn reason survey, no reason selected. 6 radio-button options in 2-column grid: El precio es muy alto, No lo uso suficiente, Poco contenido de mi interés, Problemas técnicos, Necesito una pausa, Otro motivo. Continuar button is disabled (greyed out) when no option selected.

properties.title: ¿Por qué cancelas?
properties.description: Cancellation reason screen with 'El precio es muy alto' selected (highlighted in red/pink background with filled radio button). Optional text area appears below options: 'CUÉNTANOS MÁS (OPCIONAL)' with placeholder '¿Hay algo que podríamos mejorar para que te quedaras?'. Continuar button turns active (pink/red gradient) when selection is made.

properties.title: Tenemos una oferta
properties.description: Retention offer screen shown after price-related cancellation reason. Badge: '50% DESC · 3 MESES'. Card headline: '¿Qué tal mitad de precio?' with copy 'Por motivos de precio, queremos mantenerte con nosotros.' Three info tiles: PRECIO ESPECIAL $4.99/mes (50% de descuento), DURACIÓN 3 meses (Sin compromiso adicional), DESPUÉS $9.99/mes (Cancelas cuando quieras). Primary CTA: teal 'Aceptar oferta — $4.99/mes'. Secondary: 'Mantener mi Premium'. Danger: red 'Cancelar de todos modos' at bottom.

properties.title: Mi aprendizaje
properties.description: Learning progress screen. Tu progreso card: 24 completados, 312h listening time, 47d racha activa (streak), motivational quote. COMPLETADOS section with content items list: Hábitos Atómicos (audiobook, 5h 18m, 1 may 2026, completed checkmark), Steve Jobs Stanford 2005 (charla, 15m, 1 may 2026), Respira y vuelve a ti (meditación, 12m, 30 apr 2026), El poder del ahora (audiolibro, 25m, 20 apr 2026), Alan Watts - El silencio (charla, partially visible). Dev overlay visible (Mentex Tweaks).

properties.title: ¿Por qué cancelas?
properties.description: Another variant of the cancellation reasons screen showing 'El precio es muy alto' selected. The optional text area is visible with character counter '0/280' always shown at bottom-right of the textarea (previously it may have only shown on focus). Continuar button active in pink. Audit fix: character counter visibility is always-on rather than appearing only on focus.
properties.fix_description: Character counter 0/280 always visible in textarea, not only on focus

properties.title: Configuraciones
properties.description: Settings screen state after subscription cancellation. Profile card now shows 'Plan gratuito' badge instead of 'Premium'. MI PLAN section shows 'Plan gratuito' card with copy 'Desbloquea 13 contenidos exclusivos y todas las funciones premium de Mentex'. Primary CTA button: teal 'Activar Mentex Premium'. TU CUENTA and EN LA APP sections remain the same.

properties.title: Seguridad
properties.description: Security settings screen. CONTRASEÑA section: three fields — Contraseña actual (masked, with eye toggle), Nueva contraseña (placeholder: Mín. 8 caracteres, eye toggle), Confirmar contraseña (placeholder: Repite la contraseña, eye toggle). Guardar contraseña button (disabled in empty state). Hint text: 'Usa 8+ caracteres con mayúsculas, números y símbolos para una contraseña fuerte.' AUTENTICACIÓN section: Verificación en dos pasos row with PRONTO badge (coming soon). SESIONES ACTIVAS: iPhone 15 Pro (ESTE DISPOSITIVO — Bogotá, Colombia, Activa ahora), MacBook Air M2 (Bogotá, Colombia, Hace 2 días, Cerrar button). Dev overlay visible.

properties.title: Seguridad
properties.description: Security screen with 2FA section expanded to show explanation card below the Verificación en dos pasos toggle row. Expanded card 'Autenticación de dos factores' explains: 'Pronto podrás proteger tu cuenta con una app de autenticación (Google Authenticator, Authy) o SMS. Estamos construyendo esto con cuidado para que sea seguro y fácil.' Sessions: iPhone 15 Pro (ESTE DISPOSITIVO), MacBook Air M2 (Bogotá, Hace 2 días, Cerrar).

properties.title: Seguridad
properties.description: Security screen with password form fully filled. Contraseña actual field: filled with dots. Nueva contraseña: filled (longer dots), strength indicator bar below showing 'Muy fuerte' (all segments teal/green). Confirmar contraseña: filled with matching dots and a teal checkmark. Guardar contraseña button is now active (teal). Sessions visible below: iPhone 15 Pro (ESTE DISPOSITIVO), MacBook Air M2 (Cerrar button). 2FA section collapsed.

properties.title: Seguridad
properties.description: Security screen after password save action — form has reset to empty state (fields show placeholder text again, Guardar contraseña disabled). AUTENTICACIÓN: Verificación en dos pasos with PRONTO badge. SESIONES ACTIVAS shows iPhone 15 Pro (ESTE DISPOSITIVO, Activa ahora), MacBook Air M2 (Hace 2 días, Cerrar button). This is the post-success cleared form state (likely a success toast was shown transiently). Dev overlay visible.

properties.title: Seguridad
properties.description: Security screen after revoking a session. 2FA section expanded showing Autenticación de dos factores info card. SESIONES ACTIVAS now shows only two sessions: iPhone 15 Pro (ESTE DISPOSITIVO, Bogotá, Activa ahora) and iPad Pro 12.9 (Medellín, Colombia, Hace 1 semana, Cerrar button). The MacBook Air M2 from previous screens is gone — it was successfully revoked. Different device (iPad Pro 12.9 from Medellín) now listed as second session.

Developer overlay panel (Mentex Tweaks) visible in multiple screenshots. Contains: AUTH (DEV) section with quick-nav links (Reset auth → Welcome, Welcome skip splash, Login screen, Customer → streak Mi Plan, App returning user, account with premium + no subs). ESTADO toggle (Inactivo/Activo). ACENTO color principal toggle (teal). ESTILO DE CARDS: Tarjetas options (Glass/Líneas/Plano). TIPOGRAFÍA: Familia options (Geist/Inter/Manrope).

Reusable card showing subscription state. Premium state: shows plan name, ACTIVO badge (teal), billing cycle, renewal info. Free state: shows 'Plan gratuito' with upsell copy and Activar Mentex Premium CTA button.

Multi-step subscription cancellation flow. Step 1 (Cancelar plan): loss aversion screen listing premium benefits being lost with red X icons, access end date, two CTAs (keep premium / continue cancel). Step 2 (¿Por qué cancelas?): 6-option radio grid for churn reason + optional textarea with character counter. Step 3 (Tenemos una oferta): conditional retention offer — shown when price reason selected, 50% discount for 3 months, three CTAs. Final state: settings screen shows free plan.

List of active authenticated sessions inside Seguridad screen. Each session row shows device icon, device name, 'ESTE DISPOSITIVO' badge for current device, location (city, country), last active time. Non-current sessions have a 'Cerrar' (revoke) button. Sessions shown: iPhone 15 Pro (Bogotá), MacBook Air M2 (Bogotá), iPad Pro 12.9 (Medellín).

Password strength progress bar shown below Nueva contraseña field when typing. Segmented bar that fills progressively. Strength label displayed to right: 'Muy fuerte' when all segments filled (teal color). Checkmark icon appears in Confirmar contraseña field when passwords match.

AUTENTICACIÓN section row for two-factor authentication. Shows shield icon, 'Verificación en dos pasos' label, 'Añade una capa extra de protección' subtitle, and a PRONTO (coming soon) badge. Tapping expands an info card below explaining upcoming TOTP/SMS support (Google Authenticator, Authy, SMS).

Modal bottom sheet for completed content items. Shows category badge (AUDIOLIBROS), book stack emoji artwork, content title and author, duration badge, completion date badge. Two CTA buttons: 'Escuchar de nuevo' (play again, primary teal) and 'Guardar en playlist' (secondary). Background is blurred screen behind.

Profile card at top of Configuraciones screen. Shows circular avatar, display name, @username handle, title badge (e.g. 'Mente Despierta'), subscription badge (Premium crown icon or 'Plan gratuito'), level badge (number in orange circle on avatar), XP progress bar (e.g. 234/500 XP), and 'Editar perfil' action button.

Navigation flow from Configuraciones: Gestionar suscripción → Mi Plan → Cancelar suscripción → Cancelar plan (intro) → ¿Por qué cancelas? → Tenemos una oferta OR final cancellation. Also: Configuraciones → Seguridad. Also: Configuraciones → Mi aprendizaje → Content detail sheet.
Cancel reasons screen with 'El precio es muy alto' selected, revealing optional free-text textarea and activating the Continuar button in pink

data_collected: Datos de cuenta: nombre, correo, contraseña cifrada
Datos de uso: sesiones, contenido consumido, rutinas, tiempo de enfoque
Datos de dispositivo: modelo, SO, identificadores push
Datos de pago: gestionados por App Store / Google Play
Datos opcionales: foto, biografía, redes sociales

properties.title: Licencias de código
properties.description: Open source licenses document listing all third-party libraries used by Mentex
Complete cancellation funnel: Mi Plan → Cancel Intro (features lost) → Cancel Reasons survey → Retention Offer (conditional on reason) → Cancelled confirmation
properties.retention_strategy: Conditional offer based on selected cancellation reason

properties.description: Settings → Términos hub → individual legal document screens (ToS, Privacy, Cookies, Licencias) with back navigation returning to hub
Reusable card displaying current subscription plan name, status badge (ACTIVO / gratuito), billing cycle, price and renewal info. Appears in Mi Plan screen and Settings screen
Three-column info card used inside offer screens to present key details (price/duration/after-price or pause/history/reactivation). Shared between discount offer and pause offer screens
Native in-app renderer for legal documents with version badge, last-updated date header, and section headings with left-border accent. Used for ToS, Privacy, Cookies, Licencias screens
Three-metric stats card (completados / horas aprendidas / racha activa) with motivational quote. Used in Mi Aprendizaje screen
Full subscription lifecycle: view plan, change billing cycle, view payment history, initiate cancellation with multi-step retention funnel, cancel confirmation, and reactivation upsell
In-app legal documents hub accessible from settings. Houses ToS, Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy and Code Licenses. All rendered natively (no webview needed).
Primary brand color used for active CTAs, active plan badges, XP progress bars, and accent elements throughout the app. Appears as a bright teal/mint (#00FFB2 approximate)
Pink-red color used for destructive actions (cancel subscription link, X icons for lost features, selected cancel reason radio button, active Continuar button in reasons screen)

hyperedges.label: Phase 3+4 audit findings mapped to onboarding fixes
SettingsScreen navigation router pattern
hyperedges.description: SettingsScreen acts as a client-side router: CategoryRow taps set view state, and each view renders a SubScreen wrapper — all three together implement the drill-down navigation pattern

hyperedges.label: Security sub-system: 2FA + password + sessions
hyperedges.description: All five components together implement the full security management flow: password change with confirmation, 2FA enable/disable lifecycle, and per-device session revocation

hyperedges.label: Global window store access pattern
hyperedges.description: useSettingsData reads all four global window stores (__mtxProfile, __mtxIsPremium, __mtxOnboarding, __mtxAuth) and re-renders on mtx:profile-changed event — these five nodes form the settings data layer

hyperedges.label: Premium gating pattern
hyperedges.description: All components that check window.__mtxIsPremium and call window.__mtxOpenPremiumLock to gate premium content

hyperedges.label: Ritual scheduling integration pattern
hyperedges.description: Hooks, helpers, and components that collaborate to add/check items in the daily ritual schedule

hyperedges.label: Player configuration cluster
hyperedges.description: Components and stores that control in-player configuration: skip seconds, playback speed, bookmarks, sleep timer

hyperedges.label: Social profile open flow
hyperedges.relationship: Three-node pipeline: _openSocialUrl builds URL, __mtxOpenInAppBrowser triggers sheet, InAppBrowserSheet handles blocked-domain preview vs iframe

hyperedges.label: Achievement render chain
hyperedges.relationship: Data → derivation → presentation: _ALL_ACHIEVEMENTS feeds _buildAchievementsForUser to add unlock state, AchievementCardFull renders the result

hyperedges.label: Own/foreign profile parity architecture
hyperedges.relationship: ProfileStatsTab is reused for both own and foreign profiles; _deriveStatsFor switches between hardcoded own data and seed-derived foreign data; _USER_STATS_DONUT overrides donut segments per user

hyperedges.label: Settings v7 Design System
hyperedges.description: All visual subsystems that together define the Settings v7 design language: accent colors, typography, themes, and interaction patterns

hyperedges.label: Settings as Navigation Hub
hyperedges.description: Full navigation tree rooted at the Configuración screen, spanning all drill-down sub-screens

audit_findings: Cancel reason grid had inconsistent card heights (fixed in audit-10)
Character counter in optional textarea only showed on focus (fixed in audit-11 to always visible)
Retention offer correctly triggered only for price-related cancellation reason
Post-cancel settings correctly shows free plan state
Password strength indicator works correctly (Muy fuerte state verified)
Confirm password match checkmark works
Save button correctly disabled/enabled based on form validity
Session revocation removes the session from the list
2FA row expands to show coming soon info card
Form resets to empty state after successful password save
